allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d['ok']\); data=d['data']; print\('snapshot_id:', data.get\('snapshot_id'\)\); print\('node count:', data.get\('nodeCount'\) or len\(data.get\('nodes', []\)\)\); nodes = data.get\('nodes', []\); print\('truncated:', data.get\('truncated'\)\); print\('sample nodes:'\); [print\(f'  ref={n.get\(\\"ref\\"\)} type={n.get\(\\"type\\"\)} label={n.get\(\\"label\\"\)[:50] if n.get\(\\"label\\"\) else None}'\) for n in nodes[:10]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json,re; s=sys.stdin.read\(\); d=json.loads\(s\); nodes=d['data']['nodes']; [print\(f'{n[\\"ref\\"]}: {n.get\(\\"label\\",\\"\\"\)[:80]}'\) for n in nodes if 'Tools created' in n.get\('label',''\) or 'Register' in n.get\('label',''\)]")
